title: verbascum × guelnarense
intro: Verbascum × guelnarense, also known as Gueldenstädt's mullein, is a hybrid species of Verbascum, a genus of flowering plants in the figwort family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and flowers, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The leaves and flowers of Verbascum × guelnarense have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, offering health benefits such as reducing inflammation, soothing respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herb for various herbal preparations.
